name: Apricot and Walnut Chutney
recipeIngredient: 1 pound onions, peeled and chopped fine
recipeInstructions:
If using fresh apricots, split them and remove the stones. For dried apricots, let them swell in water overnight.
Boil the chopped onions for a few moments to soften them (drain afterward).
Combine all ingredients except walnuts in a large preserving pan; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer gently, stirring regularly, until thick and jammy (about 1½ hours).
Stir in walnuts.
Pack hot into warm, sterilized jars and seal. Makes about 6 pounds.
